states.name: Antares
states.title: Knight of the Sacred Fire
states.description: From time immemorial, humanity has always seen divinity in fire. Likewise, there were always those who thought that if they could find a way to kindle a flame within themselves, they would attain divinity as well.

states.name: Antares
states.title: Knight of the Sacred Fire
states.description:
There were some who saw her burning, crimson eyes, her beauty like a flower blooming on the battlefield, and thought her a god too.
Still, depending on who looks, a god might just as easily be a demon.

states.name: Antares
states.title: Knight of the Sacred Fire
states.description: Every flame must sooner or later go out—when a candle burns out, when sudden rain quenches a raging wildfire, when a life comes to an end. However, the Sacred Fire will burn again someday—when the promised day comes.
